scenario.name: reg_redirect_302
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:10.0.0.100:5060 SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=z9hG4bK[callId]redir From: <sip:34020000001320000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag07b[callNumber] To: <sip:34020000001320000001@10.0.0.100:5060> Call-ID: [call_id]-redir CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:34020000001320000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: WVP-Test-Simulator-Redirect Expires: 3600 X-GB-ver: 2.0

REGISTER sip:10.0.0.100:5060 SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=z9hG4bK[callId]redir From: <sip:34020000001320000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag07b[callNumber] To: <sip:34020000001320000001@10.0.0.100:5060> Call-ID: [call_id]-redir CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: <sip:34020000001320000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Authorization: [authentication username=34020000001320000001 password=test12345] Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: WVP-Test-Simulator-Redirect Expires: 3600 X-GB-ver: 2.0
